steps.title: Restate the scale rule
steps.content: The sentence before the blank says visual magnitude is reverse logarithmic. The clause after the blank explains that rule in plainer terms: brighter objects have lower magnitude numbers.

steps.title: Reject wrong transitions
steps.content: A signals a similar but separate idea. B signals contrast, though the second clause explains the first. D signals an example, but the clause gives a general definition of the scale.

steps.title: Use a clarifying transition
steps.content: In other words introduces a restatement of "reverse logarithmic" in plain language. The answer is C.
